steps.description: Classifies PDFs as image-based or text-based and provides signed URLs for further processing.
steps.input_list_json: ["PDF file path (string)", "PDF file name (string)", "AWS S3 credentials/config (dict)", "SMB credentials/config (dict)", "Queue message (JSON)", "Attribute fields (string/any)"]

steps.description: Routes image-based PDFs from the classifier to the OCR step, formatting the signed URL and job metadata as required.
steps.output_list_json: ["Scanned PDF files (from S3)", "JSON job metadata (from queue)"]

steps.description: Routes text-based PDFs from the classifier to the chunking step, formatting the signed URL, configuration, and queue message as required.
steps.output_list_json: ["PDF file (from S3)", "User configuration JSON (from S3)", "Queue message (JSON with metadata)"]

steps.description: Converts scanned/image PDFs to searchable PDFs using OCR.
steps.input_list_json: ["Scanned PDF files (from S3)", "JSON job metadata (from queue)"]
steps.output_list_json: ["Searchable/readable PDF files (to S3)", "Signed S3 URLs", "JSON status messages"]

steps.description: Prepares OCR-processed PDFs for chunking by formatting the S3 URL, configuration, and queue message as required.
steps.input_list_json: ["Searchable/readable PDF files (to S3)", "Signed S3 URLs", "JSON status messages"]
steps.output_list_json: ["PDF file (from S3)", "User configuration JSON (from S3)", "Queue message (JSON with metadata)"]

steps.description: Chunks PDF content for scalable entity extraction.
steps.input_list_json: ["PDF file (from S3)", "User configuration JSON (from S3)", "Queue message (JSON with metadata)"]

steps.description: Loads chunked PDF text and prepares extraction configuration for the entity extraction LLM.
steps.output_list_json: ["Chunked PDF text (JSON)", "Extraction configuration (JSON or YAML)", "Optional: taxonomy or entity schema (JSON)"]

steps.description: Extracts financial entities from chunked PDF text using an LLM or NER engine.
steps.input_list_json: ["Chunked PDF text (JSON)", "Extraction configuration (JSON or YAML)", "Optional: taxonomy or entity schema (JSON)"]
steps.output_list_json: ["Structured JSON with extracted entities, types, values, and source references", "Extraction confidence scores", "Error logs"]

steps.description: Prepares extracted entities and input text for validation by formatting them as required for the validation step.
steps.input_list_json: ["Structured JSON with extracted entities, types, values, and source references", "Extraction confidence scores", "Error logs"]
steps.output_list_json: ["JSON message from queue", "String (input_text)", "String (response, expected to be escaped JSON)"]

steps.description: Validates and normalizes extracted entities for accuracy and consistency.
steps.input_list_json: ["JSON message from queue", "String (input_text)", "String (response, expected to be escaped JSON)"]

steps.description: Prepares validated entities and reviewer assignment info for human annotation and review.
Manages human review and annotation of extracted entities for final validation.
steps.output_list_json: ["Finalized, human-validated entities (JSON)", "Annotation metadata (reviewer, changes, timestamps)", "Audit logs"]

jobs.name: Downtown Portfolio — Q1 Leases
jobs.description: 10 commercial lease agreements from the downtown property portfolio. Focus on rent escalation clauses.
jobs.special_instructions: Pay close attention to break clauses and renewal option windows.

jobs.name: Suburban Portfolio — Mixed Leases
jobs.description: Mixed residential and commercial leases from the suburban portfolio. Lower priority — no immediate deadline.
